name: Martha & Lois:  The Tail of Two Kents
description:
[Warning: NTR (Seriously, Sorry Supes)]
When she came to the Kent Farm, Lois only meant to check in on her mother-in-law. The conversation turned melancholic as the pair had a heart-to-heart regarding Superman. Noting Lois' heartache, Martha decided to help cheer her daughter-in-law up. And so, Martha made a call...

(Part 2.5 of the Sorry Supes series)

Art/Gif Credit: Amazonium
creator: Puck4K
